title: dicranopteris linearis var. ferruginea
intro: Dicranopteris linearis var. ferruginea, also known as the rusty water fern, is a variety of the Dicranopteris linearis plant, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the fern family. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Dicranopteris linearis var. ferruginea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses.
